<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="nl">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Temperatuur in de Ketel - Rekentabel</title>
    <!-- Tailwind CSS voor een modern en fris ontwerp -->
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <style>
        /* Print-specifieke stijlen om de lay-out perfect te maken voor papier */
        @media print {
            body {
                background-color: white;
                color: black;
            }
            .no-print {
                display: none !important;
            }
            .print-block {
                display: block !important;
            }
            .print-border {
                border: 1px solid #cbd5e1 !important;
            }
            .page-break {
                page-break-before: always;
            }
            input {
                border: 1px solid #94a3b8 !important;
                background-color: transparent !important;
                color: transparent !important; /* Verberg ingevulde antwoorden voor een leeg geprint werkblad */
            }
            input::placeholder {
                color: transparent !important;
            }
        }
        
        /* Pulseer-animatie voor de AI-laadstatus */
        @keyframes brew {
            0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0) scale(1); filter: drop-shadow(0 0 2px rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.4)); }
            50% { transform: translateY(-4px) scale(1.05); filter: drop-shadow(0 0 10px rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.8)); }
        }
        .brewing-animation {
            animation: brew 2s infinite ease-in-out;
        }

        /* Vallende blokjes animatie */
        @keyframes blockDrop {
            0% { transform: translateY(-100px) rotate(-45deg); opacity: 0; }
            50% { opacity: 1; }
            100% { transform: translateY(0) rotate(var(--rot, 0deg)); }
        }
        .animate-block-drop {
            animation: blockDrop 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1) forwards;
        }

        /* Puls van een knop om hulp te benadrukken */
        @keyframes buttonPulse {
            0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.7); }
            50% { box-shadow: 0 0 15px 4px rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.9); }
        }
        .highlight-pulse-warm {
            animation: buttonPulse 1.5s infinite;
            border-color: #f43f5e !important;
        }
        .highlight-pulse-cold {
            animation: buttonPulse 1.5s infinite;
            border-color: #3b82f6 !important;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-slate-50 min-h-screen font-sans text-slate-800">

    <!-- Magisch Motivatie Modal (Pop-up met de heksenkat) -->
    <div id="motivation-modal" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/60 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4 hidden no-print">
        <div class="bg-purple-950 text-white rounded-3xl p-6 max-w-sm w-full border-4 border-purple-400 shadow-2xl text-center transform transition-all scale-95 duration-300">
            <h3 class="text-2xl font-black text-purple-200 mb-2">Cornelia zegt:</h3>
            
            <!-- Afbeeldingcontainer met paarse verloop-fallback mocht de afbeelding laden -->
            <div class="relative rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border-2 border-purple-300 mb-4 bg-gradient-to-b from-purple-900 to-indigo-950 aspect-[9/16] max-h-[380px] mx-auto flex items-center justify-center">
                <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Je kunt het!" class="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover z-10" id="modal-cat-img" onerror="this.style.display='none'; document.getElementById('modal-cat-fallback').classList.remove('hidden');">
                
                <!-- Paarse heksen-fallback (GEEN andere kattenafbeeldingen!) -->
                <div id="modal-cat-fallback" class="hidden flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 text-purple-300 z-0">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="h-16 w-16 mb-4 animate-bounce text-purple-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">
                        <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M9.813 15.904L9 21m0 0l-.813-5.096M9 21h3m-3 0H6m9.813-5.096a4.001 4.001 0 00-7.626 0L3 21h18l-1.187-5.096z" />
                    </svg>
                    <p class="font-bold text-lg text-purple-200">Magische kaart</p>
                    <p class="text-xs text-purple-400 mt-1">Spreuk wordt geladen...</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <p class="text-sm text-purple-100 italic mb-4">"Geef niet op, tovenaarsleerling! Met een beetje heksenkracht en logisch nadenken kom je er wel!"</p>
            <button onclick="toggleMotivationModal(false)" class="bg-gradient-to-r from-pink-500 to-purple-600 hover:from-pink-600 hover:to-purple-700 text-white font-bold py-2.5 px-6 rounded-xl shadow transition-all transform active:scale-95">
                Ik ga weer knallen! 💪
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 py-8">
        
        <!-- Header / Introductie (Zichtbaar op scherm) -->
        <header class="mb-8 text-center no-print">
            <h1 class="text-4xl font-extrabold text-blue-900 mb-2">Temperatuur in de Ketel</h1>
            <p class="text-slate-600 max-w-3xl mx-auto text-lg">
                Denk aan de heksenketel: 
                <span class="inline-block bg-red-100 text-red-800 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full font-semibold text-sm">Warme blokjes</span> verhogen de temperatuur met <strong class="text-red-600">+1 °C</strong>. 
                <span class="inline-block bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full font-semibold text-sm">Koude blokjes</span> verlagen de temperatuur met <strong class="text-blue-600">-1 °C</strong>.
            </p>
        </header>

        <!-- 3-Koloms Grid Layout: 2 Kolommen voor tabellen, 1 Kolom voor AI Heksenassistent + Simulator -->
        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
            
            <!-- Linker gedeelte (Breed): De Tabellen en Acties -->
            <div class="lg:col-span-2">
                
                <!-- Actiebalk (Alleen op scherm) -->
                <div class="mb-6 flex flex-wrap gap-3 justify-between items-center no-print bg-white p-4 rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-slate-100">
                    <div class="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                        <button onclick="checkAnswers()" class="bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white font-semibold px-5 py-2 rounded-lg transition-all shadow-sm">
                            Controleer alle antwoorden
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="resetAnswers()" class="bg-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-300 text-slate-700 font-semibold px-5 py-2 rounded-lg transition-all">
                            Opnieuw proberen
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Resultaten feedback (Alleen op scherm) -->
                <div id="feedbackBox" class="hidden mb-6 p-4 rounded-xl text-center font-bold text-lg no-print transition-all duration-300">
                    <span id="feedbackText"></span>
                </div>

                <!-- Tabs om te schakelen tussen de twee tabellen op het scherm -->
                <div class="flex border-b border-slate-200 mb-6 no-print">
                    <button id="tab1-btn" onclick="switchTab(1)" class="py-3 px-6 font-bold text-lg border-b-4 border-blue-600 text-blue-600 transition-all">
                        Deel 1: Warme blokjes (+)
                    </button>
                    <button id="tab2-btn" onclick="switchTab(2)" class="py-3 px-6 font-bold text-lg border-b-4 border-transparent text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-800 transition-all flex items-center gap-1.5">
                        Deel 2: Koude blokjes (-)
                    </button>
                </div>

                <!-- ================= DEEL 1: WARME BLOKJES ================= -->
                <div id="tab1-content" class="print-block">
                    <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-md border border-slate-200 overflow-hidden print-border">
                        
                        <!-- Titel voor op de geprinte versie deel 1 -->
                        <div class="hidden print:block text-center mb-6 p-4 border-b border-slate-200">
                            <h1 class="text-2xl font-bold text-slate-800">Werkblad: Temperatuur in de Ketel (Warme Blokjes)</h1>
                            <p class="text-sm text-slate-500 mt-1">Naam: ________________________ &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Klas: _________ &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Datum: _________</p>
                        </div>

                        <div class="overflow-x-auto">
                            <table class="w-full text-left border-collapse">
                                <thead>
                                    <tr class="bg-red-800 text-white print:bg-slate-100 print:text-black">
                                        <th class="p-4 font-bold text-base border-r border-red-700 print:border-slate-300 w-1/4">optelling</th>
                                        <th class="p-4 font-bold text-base text-center border-r border-red-700 print:border-slate-300 w-1/5">begintemperatuur</th>
                                        <th class="p-4 font-bold text-base text-center border-r border-red-700 print:border-slate-300 w-1/4">IN de ketel gaan</th>
                                        <th class="p-4 font-bold text-base text-center border-r border-red-700 print:border-slate-300 w-1/5">eindtemperatuur</th>
                                        <th class="p-4 font-bold text-base text-center no-print w-1/6">acties</th>
                                    </tr>
                                </thead>
                                <tbody class="divide-y divide-slate-200">
                                    
                                    <!-- Som 1 (Origineel) -->
                                    <tr class="hover:bg-slate-50/55 transition-colors" data-temp="-13" data-change="8 warme blokjes" data-eq="-13 + 8 = ...">
                                        <td class="p-4 border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <div class="font-mono text-lg mb-2">-13 + 8 =</div>
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="1" data-row="1" data-answer="-5" class="w-full max-w-[120px] px-3 py-1.5 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center font-bold text-lg border-r border-slate-200">-13 °C</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center text-slate-700 border-r border-slate-200">8 warme blokjes</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="1" data-row="1" data-answer="-5" class="w-full max-w-[160px] px-3 py-2 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center no-print">
                                            <div class="flex flex-col gap-1">
                                                <button id="btn-check-1-1" onclick="checkRow(1, 1)" class="bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-slate-300 transition-all">Controleer</button>
                                                <button onclick="askWitchForHelp(1, 1)" class="bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 hover:bg-purple-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-purple-200 transition-all">✨ Hulp</button>
                                            </div>
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>

                                    <!-- Som 2 (Origineel) -->
                                    <tr class="hover:bg-slate-50/55 transition-colors" data-temp="-3" data-change="7 warme blokjes" data-eq="-3 + 7 = ...">
                                        <td class="p-4 border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <div class="font-mono text-lg mb-2">-3 + 7 =</div>
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="1" data-row="2" data-answer="4" class="w-full max-w-[120px] px-3 py-1.5 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center font-bold text-lg border-r border-slate-200">-3 °C</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center text-slate-700 border-r border-slate-200">7 warme blokjes</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="1" data-row="2" data-answer="4" class="w-full max-w-[160px] px-3 py-2 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center no-print">
                                            <div class="flex flex-col gap-1">
                                                <button id="btn-check-1-2" onclick="checkRow(2, 1)" class="bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-slate-300 transition-all">Controleer</button>
                                                <button onclick="askWitchForHelp(2, 1)" class="bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 hover:bg-purple-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-purple-200 transition-all">✨ Hulp</button>
                                            </div>
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>

                                    <!-- Som 3 (Origineel - Formule) -->
                                    <tr class="hover:bg-slate-50/55 transition-colors" data-temp="-6" data-change="11 warme blokjes" data-eq="... + ... = ...">
                                        <td class="p-4 border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="1" data-row="3" data-answer="-6+11=5" class="w-full px-3 py-2 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-mono font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center font-bold text-lg border-r border-slate-200">-6 °C</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center text-slate-700 border-r border-slate-200">11 warme blokjes</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="1" data-row="3" data-answer="5" class="w-full max-w-[160px] px-3 py-2 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center no-print">
                                            <div class="flex flex-col gap-1">
                                                <button id="btn-check-1-3" onclick="checkRow(3, 1)" class="bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-slate-300 transition-all">Controleer</button>
                                                <button onclick="askWitchForHelp(3, 1)" class="bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 hover:bg-purple-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-purple-200 transition-all">✨ Hulp</button>
                                            </div>
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>

                                    <!-- Som 4 -->
                                    <tr class="hover:bg-slate-50/55 transition-colors" data-temp="-8" data-change="5 warme blokjes" data-eq="-8 + 5 = ...">
                                        <td class="p-4 border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <div class="font-mono text-lg mb-2">-8 + 5 =</div>
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="1" data-row="4" data-answer="-3" class="w-full max-w-[120px] px-3 py-1.5 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center font-bold text-lg border-r border-slate-200">-8 °C</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center text-slate-700 border-r border-slate-200">5 warme blokjes</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="1" data-row="4" data-answer="-3" class="w-full max-w-[160px] px-3 py-2 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center no-print">
                                            <div class="flex flex-col gap-1">
                                                <button id="btn-check-1-4" onclick="checkRow(4, 1)" class="bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-slate-300 transition-all">Controleer</button>
                                                <button onclick="askWitchForHelp(4, 1)" class="bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 hover:bg-purple-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-purple-200 transition-all">✨ Hulp</button>
                                            </div>
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>

                                    <!-- Som 5 -->
                                    <tr class="hover:bg-slate-50/55 transition-colors" data-temp="-15" data-change="15 warme blokjes" data-eq="-15 + 15 = ...">
                                        <td class="p-4 border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <div class="font-mono text-lg mb-2">-15 + 15 =</div>
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="1" data-row="5" data-answer="0" class="w-full max-w-[120px] px-3 py-1.5 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center font-bold text-lg border-r border-slate-200">-15 °C</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center text-slate-700 border-r border-slate-200">15 warme blokjes</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="1" data-row="5" data-answer="0" class="w-full max-w-[160px] px-3 py-2 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center no-print">
                                            <div class="flex flex-col gap-1">
                                                <button id="btn-check-1-5" onclick="checkRow(5, 1)" class="bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-slate-300 transition-all">Controleer</button>
                                                <button onclick="askWitchForHelp(5, 1)" class="bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 hover:bg-purple-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-purple-200 transition-all">✨ Hulp</button>
                                            </div>
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>

                                    <!-- Som 6 -->
                                    <tr class="hover:bg-slate-50/55 transition-colors" data-temp="-12" data-change="20 warme blokjes" data-eq="... + ... = ...">
                                        <td class="p-4 border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="1" data-row="6" data-answer="-12+20=8" class="w-full px-3 py-2 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-mono font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center font-bold text-lg border-r border-slate-200">-12 °C</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center text-slate-700 border-r border-slate-200">20 warme blokjes</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="1" data-row="6" data-answer="8" class="w-full max-w-[160px] px-3 py-2 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center no-print">
                                            <div class="flex flex-col gap-1">
                                                <button id="btn-check-1-6" onclick="checkRow(6, 1)" class="bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-slate-300 transition-all">Controleer</button>
                                                <button onclick="askWitchForHelp(6, 1)" class="bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 hover:bg-purple-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-purple-200 transition-all">✨ Hulp</button>
                                            </div>
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>

                                    <!-- Som 7 -->
                                    <tr class="hover:bg-slate-50/55 transition-colors" data-temp="-2" data-change="9 warme blokjes" data-eq="-2 + 9 = ...">
                                        <td class="p-4 border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <div class="font-mono text-lg mb-2">-2 + 9 =</div>
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="1" data-row="7" data-answer="7" class="w-full max-w-[120px] px-3 py-1.5 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center font-bold text-lg border-r border-slate-200">-2 °C</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center text-slate-700 border-r border-slate-200">9 warme blokjes</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="1" data-row="7" data-answer="7" class="w-full max-w-[160px] px-3 py-2 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center no-print">
                                            <div class="flex flex-col gap-1">
                                                <button id="btn-check-1-7" onclick="checkRow(7, 1)" class="bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-slate-300 transition-all">Controleer</button>
                                                <button onclick="askWitchForHelp(7, 1)" class="bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 hover:bg-purple-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-purple-200 transition-all">✨ Hulp</button>
                                            </div>
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>

                                    <!-- Som 8 -->
                                    <tr class="hover:bg-slate-50/55 transition-colors" data-temp="-7" data-change="6 warme blokjes" data-eq="... + ... = ...">
                                        <td class="p-4 border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="1" data-row="8" data-answer="-7+6=-1" class="w-full px-3 py-2 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-mono font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center font-bold text-lg border-r border-slate-200">-7 °C</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center text-slate-700 border-r border-slate-200">6 warme blokjes</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="1" data-row="8" data-answer="-1" class="w-full max-w-[160px] px-3 py-2 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center no-print">
                                            <div class="flex flex-col gap-1">
                                                <button id="btn-check-1-8" onclick="checkRow(8, 1)" class="bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-slate-300 transition-all">Controleer</button>
                                                <button onclick="askWitchForHelp(8, 1)" class="bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 hover:bg-purple-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-purple-200 transition-all">✨ Hulp</button>
                                            </div>
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>

                                    <!-- Som 9 -->
                                    <tr class="hover:bg-slate-50/55 transition-colors" data-temp="-4" data-change="12 warme blokjes" data-eq="-4 + 12 = ...">
                                        <td class="p-4 border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <div class="font-mono text-lg mb-2">-4 + 12 =</div>
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="1" data-row="9" data-answer="8" class="w-full max-w-[120px] px-3 py-1.5 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center font-bold text-lg border-r border-slate-200">-4 °C</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center text-slate-700 border-r border-slate-200">12 warme blokjes</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="1" data-row="9" data-answer="8" class="w-full max-w-[160px] px-3 py-2 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center no-print">
                                            <div class="flex flex-col gap-1">
                                                <button id="btn-check-1-9" onclick="checkRow(9, 1)" class="bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-slate-300 transition-all">Controleer</button>
                                                <button onclick="askWitchForHelp(9, 1)" class="bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 hover:bg-purple-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-purple-200 transition-all">✨ Hulp</button>
                                            </div>
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>

                                </tbody>
                            </table>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Knop naar Deel 2 onderaan Deel 1 -->
                    <div id="next-part-trigger" class="mt-8 p-6 bg-blue-50 border-2 border-blue-200 rounded-2xl text-center shadow-sm no-print">
                        <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-blue-800 mb-1">Klaar met Deel 1?</h3>
                        <p class="text-blue-600 mb-4 text-sm">Deel 2 is al open, dus je kunt meteen verder met de koude blokjes.</p>
                        <button onclick="switchTab(2)" class="bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white font-bold px-6 py-3 rounded-xl shadow-md transition-all inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-base transform hover:scale-105">
                            Ga naar Deel 2: Koude blokjes
                            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="h-5 w-5 animate-pulse" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
                                <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M14 5l7 7m0 0l-7 7m7-7H3" />
                            </svg>
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- ================= DEEL 2: KOUDE BLOKJES ================= -->
                <div id="tab2-content" class="hidden print-block page-break">
                    <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-md border border-slate-200 overflow-hidden print-border">
                        
                        <!-- Titel voor op de geprinte versie deel 2 -->
                        <div class="hidden print:block text-center mb-6 p-4 border-b border-slate-200">
                            <h1 class="text-2xl font-bold text-slate-800">Werkblad: Temperatuur in de Ketel (Koude Blokjes)</h1>
                            <p class="text-sm text-slate-500 mt-1">Naam: ________________________ &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Klas: _________ &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Datum: _________</p>
                        </div>

                        <div class="overflow-x-auto">
                            <table class="w-full text-left border-collapse">
                                <thead>
                                    <tr class="bg-blue-800 text-white print:bg-slate-100 print:text-black">
                                        <th class="p-4 font-bold text-base border-r border-blue-700 print:border-slate-300 w-1/4">optelling</th>
                                        <th class="p-4 font-bold text-base text-center border-r border-blue-700 print:border-slate-300 w-1/5">begintemperatuur</th>
                                        <th class="p-4 font-bold text-base text-center border-r border-blue-700 print:border-slate-300 w-1/4">IN de ketel gaan</th>
                                        <th class="p-4 font-bold text-base text-center border-r border-blue-700 print:border-slate-300 w-1/5">eindtemperatuur</th>
                                        <th class="p-4 font-bold text-base text-center no-print w-1/6">acties</th>
                                    </tr>
                                </thead>
                                <tbody class="divide-y divide-slate-200">
                                    
                                    <!-- Som 1 (Nieuwe Origineel) -->
                                    <tr class="hover:bg-slate-50/55 transition-colors" data-temp="-7" data-change="15 koude blokjes" data-eq="-7 + -15 = ...">
                                        <td class="p-4 border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <div class="font-mono text-lg mb-2">-7 + -15 =</div>
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="2" data-row="1" data-answer="-22" class="w-full max-w-[120px] px-3 py-1.5 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center font-bold text-lg border-r border-slate-200">-7 °C</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center text-slate-700 border-r border-slate-200">15 koude blokjes</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="2" data-row="1" data-answer="-22" class="w-full max-w-[160px] px-3 py-2 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center no-print">
                                            <div class="flex flex-col gap-1">
                                                <button id="btn-check-2-1" onclick="checkRow(1, 2)" class="bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-slate-300 transition-all">Controleer</button>
                                                <button onclick="askWitchForHelp(1, 2)" class="bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 hover:bg-purple-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-purple-200 transition-all">✨ Hulp</button>
                                            </div>
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>

                                    <!-- Som 2 (Nieuwe Origineel) -->
                                    <tr class="hover:bg-slate-50/55 transition-colors" data-temp="-1" data-change="8 koude blokjes" data-eq="-1 + ... = ...">
                                        <td class="p-4 border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <div class="font-mono text-lg mb-2 flex items-center gap-1">-1 + <input type="text" data-tab="2" data-row="2" data-answer="-8" class="w-20 px-2 py-1 border border-slate-300 rounded text-center font-bold text-base focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="..."> =</div>
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center font-bold text-lg border-r border-slate-200">-1 °C</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center text-slate-700 border-r border-slate-200">8 koude blokjes</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="2" data-row="2" data-answer="-9" class="w-full max-w-[160px] px-3 py-2 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center no-print">
                                            <div class="flex flex-col gap-1">
                                                <button id="btn-check-2-2" onclick="checkRow(2, 2)" class="bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-slate-300 transition-all">Controleer</button>
                                                <button onclick="askWitchForHelp(2, 2)" class="bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 hover:bg-purple-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-purple-200 transition-all">✨ Hulp</button>
                                            </div>
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>

                                    <!-- Som 3 (Nieuwe Origineel) -->
                                    <tr class="hover:bg-slate-50/55 transition-colors" data-temp="8" data-change="9 koude blokjes" data-eq="... + ... = ...">
                                        <td class="p-4 border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="2" data-row="3" data-answer="8+-9=-1" class="w-full px-3 py-2 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-mono font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center font-bold text-lg border-r border-slate-200">8 °C</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center text-slate-700 border-r border-slate-200">9 koude blokjes</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="2" data-row="3" data-answer="-1" class="w-full max-w-[160px] px-3 py-2 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center no-print">
                                            <div class="flex flex-col gap-1">
                                                <button id="btn-check-2-3" onclick="checkRow(3, 2)" class="bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-slate-300 transition-all">Controleer</button>
                                                <button onclick="askWitchForHelp(3, 2)" class="bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 hover:bg-purple-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-purple-200 transition-all">✨ Hulp</button>
                                            </div>
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>

                                    <!-- Som 4 (Nieuw) -->
                                    <tr class="hover:bg-slate-50/55 transition-colors" data-temp="-3" data-change="5 koude blokjes" data-eq="-3 + -5 = ...">
                                        <td class="p-4 border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <div class="font-mono text-lg mb-2">-3 + -5 =</div>
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="2" data-row="4" data-answer="-8" class="w-full max-w-[120px] px-3 py-1.5 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center font-bold text-lg border-r border-slate-200">-3 °C</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center text-slate-700 border-r border-slate-200">5 koude blokjes</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="2" data-row="4" data-answer="-8" class="w-full max-w-[160px] px-3 py-2 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center no-print">
                                            <div class="flex flex-col gap-1">
                                                <button id="btn-check-2-4" onclick="checkRow(4, 2)" class="bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-slate-300 transition-all">Controleer</button>
                                                <button onclick="askWitchForHelp(4, 2)" class="bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 hover:bg-purple-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-purple-200 transition-all">✨ Hulp</button>
                                            </div>
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>

                                    <!-- Som 5 (Nieuw) -->
                                    <tr class="hover:bg-slate-50/55 transition-colors" data-temp="12" data-change="10 koude blokjes" data-eq="12 + -10 = ...">
                                        <td class="p-4 border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <div class="font-mono text-lg mb-2">12 + -10 =</div>
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="2" data-row="5" data-answer="2" class="w-full max-w-[120px] px-3 py-1.5 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center font-bold text-lg border-r border-slate-200">12 °C</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center text-slate-700 border-r border-slate-200">10 koude blokjes</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="2" data-row="5" data-answer="2" class="w-full max-w-[160px] px-3 py-2 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center no-print">
                                            <div class="flex flex-col gap-1">
                                                <button id="btn-check-2-5" onclick="checkRow(5, 2)" class="bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-slate-300 transition-all">Controleer</button>
                                                <button onclick="askWitchForHelp(5, 2)" class="bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 hover:bg-purple-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-purple-200 transition-all">✨ Hulp</button>
                                            </div>
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>

                                    <!-- Som 6 (Nieuw) -->
                                    <tr class="hover:bg-slate-50/55 transition-colors" data-temp="-5" data-change="6 koude blokjes" data-eq="... + ... = ...">
                                        <td class="p-4 border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="2" data-row="6" data-answer="-5+-6=-11" class="w-full px-3 py-2 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-mono font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center font-bold text-lg border-r border-slate-200">-5 °C</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center text-slate-700 border-r border-slate-200">6 koude blokjes</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="2" data-row="6" data-answer="-11" class="w-full max-w-[160px] px-3 py-2 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center no-print">
                                            <div class="flex flex-col gap-1">
                                                <button id="btn-check-2-6" onclick="checkRow(6, 2)" class="bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-slate-300 transition-all">Controleer</button>
                                                <button onclick="askWitchForHelp(6, 2)" class="bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 hover:bg-purple-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-purple-200 transition-all">✨ Hulp</button>
                                            </div>
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>

                                    <!-- Som 7 (Nieuw) -->
                                    <tr class="hover:bg-slate-50/55 transition-colors" data-temp="5" data-change="12 koude blokjes" data-eq="5 + ... = ...">
                                        <td class="p-4 border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <div class="font-mono text-lg mb-2 flex items-center gap-1">5 + <input type="text" data-tab="2" data-row="7" data-answer="-12" class="w-20 px-2 py-1 border border-slate-300 rounded text-center font-bold text-base focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="..."> =</div>
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center font-bold text-lg border-r border-slate-200">5 °C</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center text-slate-700 border-r border-slate-200">12 koude blokjes</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="2" data-row="7" data-answer="-7" class="w-full max-w-[160px] px-3 py-2 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center no-print">
                                            <div class="flex flex-col gap-1">
                                                <button id="btn-check-2-7" onclick="checkRow(7, 2)" class="bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-slate-300 transition-all">Controleer</button>
                                                <button onclick="askWitchForHelp(7, 2)" class="bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 hover:bg-purple-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-purple-200 transition-all">✨ Hulp</button>
                                            </div>
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>

                                    <!-- Som 8 (Nieuw) -->
                                    <tr class="hover:bg-slate-50/55 transition-colors" data-temp="-10" data-change="12 koude blokjes" data-eq="-10 + -12 = ...">
                                        <td class="p-4 border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <div class="font-mono text-lg mb-2">-10 + -12 =</div>
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="2" data-row="8" data-answer="-22" class="w-full max-w-[120px] px-3 py-1.5 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center font-bold text-lg border-r border-slate-200">-10 °C</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center text-slate-700 border-r border-slate-200">12 koude blokjes</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="2" data-row="8" data-answer="-22" class="w-full max-w-[160px] px-3 py-2 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center no-print">
                                            <div class="flex flex-col gap-1">
                                                <button id="btn-check-2-8" onclick="checkRow(8, 2)" class="bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-slate-300 transition-all">Controleer</button>
                                                <button onclick="askWitchForHelp(8, 2)" class="bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 hover:bg-purple-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-purple-200 transition-all">✨ Hulp</button>
                                            </div>
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>

                                    <!-- Som 9 (Nieuw) -->
                                    <tr class="hover:bg-slate-50/55 transition-colors" data-temp="2" data-change="8 koude blokjes" data-eq ... + ... = ...>
                                        <td class="p-4 border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="2" data-row="9" data-answer="2+-8=-6" class="w-full px-3 py-2 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-mono font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center font-bold text-lg border-r border-slate-200">2 °C</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center text-slate-700 border-r border-slate-200">8 koude blokjes</td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center border-r border-slate-200">
                                            <input type="text" data-tab="2" data-row="9" data-answer="-6" class="w-full max-w-[160px] px-3 py-2 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-center font-bold text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-blue-500" placeholder="...">
                                        </td>
                                        <td class="p-4 text-center no-print">
                                            <div class="flex flex-col gap-1">
                                                <button id="btn-check-2-9" onclick="checkRow(9, 2)" class="bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-slate-300 transition-all">Controleer</button>
                                                <button onclick="askWitchForHelp(9, 2)" class="bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 hover:bg-purple-200 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs border border-purple-200 transition-all">✨ Hulp</button>
                                            </div>
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>

                                </tbody>
                            </table>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Succesbericht als alles in Deel 2 goed is -->
                    <div id="completion-trigger" class="hidden mt-8 p-6 bg-emerald-100 border-2 border-emerald-300 rounded-2xl text-center shadow-md no-print">
                        <h3 class="text-2xl font-extrabold text-emerald-900 mb-1">🎉 Fantastisch gedaan! Helemaal klaar!</h3>
                        <p class="text-emerald-700 text-base">Je hebt alle sommen over zowel de warme als de koude blokjes foutloos opgelost!</p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Extra Hulp / Spelregels (Zacht geel paneeltje) -->
                <section class="mt-8 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl p-6 border border-amber-200 no-print">
                    <h2 class="text-lg font-bold text-amber-800 mb-2 flex items-center gap-1.5">
                        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="h-5 w-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
                            <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M13 16h-1v-4h-1m1-4h.01M21 12a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z" />
                        </svg>
                        Spelregels van de Ketel
                    </h2>
                    <ul class="list-disc list-inside space-y-1 text-amber-900 text-sm">
                        <li><strong>Warme blokjes:</strong> Verwarmen de ketel. Je telt een positief getal op (bijv. $+ 8$). De temperatuur stijgt.</li>
                        <li><strong>Koude blokjes:</strong> Koelen de ketel af. Je telt een negatief getal op (bijv. $+ -15$). De temperatuur daalt.</li>
                        <li><strong>Formules invoeren:</strong> Schrijf negatieve getallen direct na het plusteken (bijv. `2 + -8 = -6`). Het systeem keurt zowel met als zonder haakjes goed (zoals `2 + (-8) = -6`).</li>
                    </ul>
                </section>
                
            </div>

            <!-- Rechter gedeelte: Het "Magische Heksenlab" (Simulator + AI Assistent) -->
            <div id="ai-assistant-container" class="lg:col-span-1 no-print">
                <div class="sticky top-6 bg-purple-900 text-white rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-xl border-4 border-purple-400 flex flex-col gap-6">
                    
                    <!-- Heksenkat Avatar & Header -->
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-4 border-b border-purple-800 pb-4">
                        <div class="relative overflow-hidden brewing-animation">
                            <!-- Hier is de geüploade heksenkat geplaatst als een prachtige ronde avatar -->
                            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Heks Cornelia" class="h-16 w-16 rounded-full object-cover border-2 border-purple-300 shadow-md cursor-pointer z-10" id="avatar-cat-img" onclick="toggleMotivationModal(true)" onerror="this.style.display='none'; document.getElementById('avatar-cat-fallback').classList.remove('hidden');">
                            
                            <!-- Paarse heksen-fallback avatar (GEEN andere kattenafbeeldingen!) -->
                            <div id="avatar-cat-fallback" class="hidden h-16 w-16 rounded-full bg-purple-950 border-2 border-purple-300 shadow-md flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer" onclick="toggleMotivationModal(true)">
                                <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="h-8 w-8 text-purple-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                                    <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M9.813 15.904L9 21m0 0l-.813-5.096M9 21h3m-3 0H6m9.813-5.096a4.001 4.001 0 00-7.626 0L3 21h18l-1.187-5.096z" />
                                </svg>
                            </div>
                            
                            <span class="absolute bottom-0 right-0 flex h-3.5 w-3.5 z-20">
                                <span class="animate-ping absolute inline-flex h-full w-full rounded-full bg-green-400 opacity-75"></span>
                                <span class="relative inline-flex rounded-full h-3.5 w-3.5 bg-green-500 border border-purple-900"></span>
                            </span>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <h2 class="text-xl font-black tracking-wide text-purple-200">🧪 Het Heksenlab</h2>
                            <p class="text-xs text-purple-300">Cornelia de Reken-Heks 🐈‍⬛</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- VISUELE KETEL SIMULATOR -->
                    <div class="bg-purple-950 p-4 rounded-2xl border border-purple-800 text-center relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col items-center">
                        <h3 class="text-xs font-bold text-purple-300 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2">Heksenketel Simulator</h3>
                        
                        <!-- Thermometer en Ketel visueel -->
                        <div class="flex gap-8 items-end justify-center w-full min-h-[150px] my-2">
                            
                            <!-- Thermometer -->
                            <div class="flex flex-col items-center">
                                 <!-- Buizensectie -->
                                 <div class="w-3.5 h-28 bg-purple-900/80 rounded-full relative border border-purple-700 p-0.5 flex items-end">
                                      <div id="sim-thermometer-level" class="w-full bg-gradient-to-t from-red-600 to-rose-400 rounded-full transition-all duration-500 ease-out" style="height: 50%;"></div>
                                      <!-- Schaalverdeling graadtekens -->
                                      <div class="absolute inset-y-0 right-[-14px] flex flex-col justify-between text-[8px] text-purple-300 font-mono select-none h-full py-1">
                                           <span>30</span>
                                           <span>15</span>
                                           <span>0</span>
                                           <span>-15</span>
                                           <span>-30</span>
                                      </div>
                                 </div>
                                 <!-- Bulb -->
                                 <div class="w-6 h-6 bg-red-600 rounded-full border border-purple-700 mt-[-4px] z-10 flex items-center justify-center shadow-md">
                                      <div class="w-2.5 h-2.5 bg-rose-400 rounded-full opacity-60"></div>
                                 </div>
                                 <span id="sim-temp-display" class="text-xs font-bold mt-1 text-purple-200">0 °C</span>
                            </div>
                            
                            <!-- Ketel (Cauldron) -->
                            <div class="relative w-36 h-32 flex items-end justify-center">
                                 <!-- Ketel SVG -->
                                 <svg class="w-full h-full text-purple-950 drop-shadow-xl" viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="currentColor">
                                      <!-- Achterste vloeistofvulling (Donkergroen) -->
                                      <ellipse cx="50" cy="25" rx="38" ry="12" fill="#14532d"/>
                                      <!-- Pot van de ketel -->
                                      <path d="M12 25 C12 15, 88 15, 88 25 C88 35, 88 45, 80 75 C72 95, 28 95, 20 75 C12 45, 12 35, 12 25 Z" fill="#1e1b4b" stroke="#7e22ce" stroke-width="2.5"/>
                                      <!-- Voorste vloeistofrand (Heldergroen vloeibaar heksensap) -->
                                      <ellipse cx="50" cy="23" rx="38" ry="10" fill="#15803d" stroke="#7e22ce" stroke-width="1.5"/>
                                      <!-- Poten -->
                                      <path d="M22 75 L14 92 C12 96, 26 96, 26 92 Z" fill="#0f0e26" />
                                      <path d="M78 75 L86 92 C88 96, 74 96, 74 92 Z" fill="#0f0e26" />
                                 </svg>
                                 
                                 <!-- Blokjes Container (Vallen en drijven hierin) -->
                                 <div id="sim-blocks-container" class="absolute inset-x-0 bottom-4 top-6 overflow-hidden pointer-events-none flex flex-wrap-reverse content-start justify-center px-6 pb-2 gap-1 max-h-[70px]">
                                      <!-- Blokjes worden hier dynamisch ingeladen -->
                                 </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <!-- Simulator Instellingen & Bediening -->
                        <div class="w-full bg-purple-900/40 p-3 rounded-xl border border-purple-800/80 text-xs mt-2">
                            <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
                                <span class="text-purple-300">Starttemperatuur:</span>
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                                    <button onclick="adjustSimStartTemp(-1)" class="bg-purple-800 hover:bg-purple-700 px-2 py-0.5 rounded font-extrabold text-white text-sm transition-colors">-</button>
                                    <input type="number" id="sim-start-temp" onchange="onSimStartTempChange()" class="w-12 bg-purple-950 text-white border border-purple-700 text-center rounded font-bold focus:outline-none focus:border-purple-400" value="0">
                                    <span class="text-purple-300 font-bold">°C</span>
                                    <button onclick="adjustSimStartTemp(1)" class="bg-purple-800 hover:bg-purple-700 px-2 py-0.5 rounded font-extrabold text-white text-sm transition-colors">+</button>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            
                            <!-- Blokjes toevoegknoppen -->
                            <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 mt-3">
                                <button id="btn-add-warm" onclick="addSimBlock(true)" class="bg-gradient-to-r from-red-600 to-rose-500 hover:from-red-700 hover:to-rose-600 text-white font-bold py-2 px-1 rounded-lg transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-1 active:scale-95 shadow-sm border border-transparent">
                                    <span class="bg-white/20 w-4 h-4 rounded flex items-center justify-center font-extrabold">+</span>
                                    Warm blokje
                                </button>
                                <button id="btn-add-cold" onclick="addSimBlock(false)" class="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-cyan-500 hover:from-blue-700 hover:to-cyan-600 text-white font-bold py-2 px-1 rounded-lg transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-1 active:scale-95 shadow-sm border border-transparent">
                                    <span class="bg-white/20 w-4 h-4 rounded flex items-center justify-center font-extrabold">-</span>
                                    Koud blokje
                                </button>
                            </div>
                            
                            <!-- Hulp Reset knop -->
                            <div class="flex gap-2 mt-2">
                                <button onclick="clearKettleBlocksOnly()" class="w-1/2 bg-purple-800/60 hover:bg-purple-800 text-purple-300 hover:text-purple-200 font-semibold py-1 rounded-lg border border-purple-700 transition-colors text-[10px]">
                                     Legen
                                </button>
                                <button onclick="resetSimKettleToDefault()" class="w-1/2 bg-purple-800/60 hover:bg-purple-800 text-purple-300 hover:text-purple-200 font-semibold py-1 rounded-lg border border-purple-700 transition-colors text-[10px]">
                                     Alles Reset
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <!-- Simulatie Doelbox (Bij som hulp) -->
                        <div id="sim-target-box" class="w-full mt-2.5 p-2 bg-purple-900/20 rounded-xl text-left border border-purple-800/40 text-[11px]">
                            <p class="text-purple-300 font-semibold mb-0.5 flex items-center gap-1">
                                <span class="w-2 h-2 bg-purple-400 rounded-full"></span>
                                Actief Doel:
                            </p>
                            <p id="sim-target-desc" class="text-purple-100 italic">Vrij oefenen: Voeg blokjes toe om te ontdekken wat er met de temperatuur gebeurt!</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- AI Heks Cornelia Spreekt -->
                    <div class="flex flex-col gap-3">
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-purple-800 pb-2">
                            <span class="text-xs text-purple-300 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest">Heks Cornelia Spreekt</span>
                            <div class="flex gap-1.5">
                                <button onclick="toggleMotivationModal(true)" class="text-[10px] bg-gradient-to-r from-pink-600 to-purple-700 hover:from-pink-700 hover:to-purple-800 text-white font-bold py-1 px-2.5 rounded transition-all">
                                    Moedig mij aan! 🐱
                                </button>
                                <button onclick="generateWitchRiddle()" class="text-[10px] bg-purple-800 hover:bg-purple-700 text-purple-200 font-bold py-1 px-2.5 rounded transition-all border border-purple-700">
                                    Raadsel 📜
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <!-- AI Output Spreekballon -->
                        <div class="bg-purple-950/70 p-4 rounded-2xl border border-purple-800 text-xs leading-relaxed text-purple-100 min-h-[100px] max-h-[180px] overflow-y-auto" id="ai-chat-output">
                            <p class="italic text-purple-200">
                                "Welkom in mijn lab, jonge rekenaar! Heb je moeite met een som? Klik dan op de paarse <strong class="text-purple-300">✨ Hulp</strong> knop naast een som in de tabel. Ik stel direct de ketel voor je in en help je op weg!"
                            </p>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Chat Input voor eigen vragen -->
                        <div class="relative">
                            <input type="text" id="ai-user-query" onkeydown="handleQueryKey(event)" class="w-full bg-purple-950 border-2 border-purple-700 rounded-xl py-1.5 pl-3 pr-10 text-xs text-white placeholder-purple-400 focus:outline-none focus:border-purple-400" placeholder="Stel een vraag aan de heks...">
                            <button onclick="sendUserQuery()" class="absolute right-1 top-1 bg-purple-500 hover:bg-purple-400 text-white p-1 rounded-lg transition-colors">
                                <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="h-3 w-3" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
                                    <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M14 5l7 7m0 0l-7 7m7-7H3" />
                                </svg>
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                </div>
            </div>

        </div>
        
    </div>

    <script>
        // ================= GEMINI API INTEGRATIE =================
        const apiKey = ""; // Platform vult deze API key automatisch runtime in
